restriction.android:title: Enforce FIPS-Only Mode
restriction.android:description: If enabled, the application will operate in a strict FIPS-only mode. The option to start a 'Standard Chat' will be disabled, and any incoming non-FIPS sessions will be rejected. This is the primary control for enforcing a strict compliance posture.

restriction.android:title: Allow Chat Backups
restriction.android:description: If disabled, the ability for users to create local or cloud-based chat backups will be removed. This prevents sensitive data from being exfiltrated via backup mechanisms.

restriction.android:title: Force Screen Security
restriction.android.description: If enabled, the app will enforce screen security (disabling screenshots and app previews in the recents list) regardless of user settings. If disabled, it allows the global MDM device policy to take precedence.
